svg.aria-label: NO RAG request frames for PDF, text, image and audio, each with system prompt, conversation history, whole-file payload and a question; plus a Files API frame whose file_id resolves rightward to server storage holding pdf, image and audio files.
svg.text: NO RAG — the WHOLE thing goes in the request frame
FRAME · Files API request — a reference, not the bytes
just a few bytes — file is NOT in the frame
Sent once. The frame carries only the id; the bytes stay on the provider's server (you DELETE / it expires).
Still NO RAG — the model reads the whole file; the file_id just spares you re-uploading it every call.
